alt: Abstract AtlasOps AI workflow map for an AI Business Automation Audit
deliverables: Workflow review, opportunity map, tool stack recommendation, marketing automation plan, risk checklist, and 7-day roadmap.
helps: Operators, founders, consultants, creators, and small businesses with manual follow-up, website, payment, or content gaps.
name: AI Business Automation Audit
process: Send the workflow and public website details.
You receive an implementation-ready audit report.

alt: AtlasOps AI quiet SaaS workflow map for agent-native rebuild planning
deliverables: Candidate scoring report, acquisition diligence checklist, workflow map, authorized support-ticket pain analysis if available, agent-native MVP spec, relaunch copy, content/ad drafts, and privacy-risk checklist.
helps: Founders, operators, and buyers evaluating quiet or underperforming SaaS products.
name: Dead SaaS to Agent-Native Business Audit
process: Review authorization and data rights before private material.
Build one-feature MVP spec and relaunch plan.

alt: AtlasOps AI marketing automation flow with source-backed content and follow-up signals
deliverables: Marketing workflow map, automation opportunities, content cadence, and approval boundaries.
helps: Teams that need better intake, follow-up, content, and campaign handoffs.
name: AI Marketing Automation Audit
process: Create a safer campaign operating plan.

alt: AtlasOps AI website and PayPal CTA workflow card
deliverables: Static page structure, PayPal.me CTA, UTM links, tracked static /go routes, and content guard review.
helps: Businesses that need a clear service page and payment path.
name: AI Website + PayPal CTA Setup

alt: AtlasOps AI social content system with source-backed posts and manual-final-click gates
deliverables: Source-backed post templates, queue, duplicate guard, UTM links, and manual-final-click workflow.
helps: Operators who want a daily content machine without unsupported claims.
name: AI Social Content System Setup
process: Queue or publish only when platform gates pass.

alt: AtlasOps AI code intelligence audit diagram with checks, diffs, and rollback points
deliverables: Code review, workflow plan, risk map, test recommendations, and delivery checklist.
helps: Teams with codebases that need repair, documentation, or safer automation.
name: Code Intelligence / Spec-Driven Audit
process: Create a repair plan with verification steps.

alt: AtlasOps AI OCR document workflow showing forms, tables, and verification checks
deliverables: OCR path, extraction plan, verification rules, workflow routing, and fallback handling.
helps: Businesses with forms, receipts, PDFs, screenshots, or repeat document handling.
name: OCR + Document Workflow Automation
